response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with a strong recent match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Optilyz, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq — a directly relevant and relatively rare requirement of this role. Deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and much of the frontend history being Ember rather than React.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP development experience, directly matching a required skill
Long full-stack track record on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes)
Strong testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, built test runners and assertion libraries, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated
Significant frontend history in Ember rather than React
